_meta: London places featured on /discover/, /london/<theme>/, and per-listing 'What's nearby'. lat/lng for Haversine distance against BOOM listings. anchor = #section_id on /discover/. tags = array used by theme pages.

_tags_glossary.halal-area: neighbourhood with concentrated halal options (e.g. Edgware Road, Whitechapel)
_tags_glossary.kids-free: kids enjoy AND it's free (under 16 free, etc.)
_tags_glossary.iconic: London landmark a first-time visitor wants to see
